pat_note_resolved_by_operator: 2026-04-25 (CORRECTED, supersedes 2026-04-23 entry): The 'update CLAUDE.md PAT' TODO was NOT a phantom. Project CLAUDE.md (md5 7caa81c513c47df50e47a5ee3ffc4903) is clean — that part of the 04-23 investigation was correct. But user-level CLAUDE.md (~/CLAUDE.md or ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, outside operator session visibility) did contain a Devilwench KEV-scoped PAT that the decider correctly identified each run. Operator confirmed Devilwench PAT was already expired/invalid and removed it from user-level CLAUDE.md on 2026-04-25. The earlier HNOTE-DECIDER-CLAUDE-MD-PAT-PHANTOM-001 has been superseded by HNOTE-DECIDER-CLAUDE-MD-PAT-CORRECTED-002 with the corrected story. Decider agents: do not re-flag this; source is removed.
